title: Passport claim flow + PassportQube wallet + metaMe agentiqos mirror shipped
body: Continuation of claude/optimistic-davinci-exiykx: (1) POST /api/polity-passport/credential/[passportId] claims the VC and stamps credential_claimed_at (migration 20260612100000 must be run); (2) GET /api/polity-passport/wallet lists the active persona's passports — works for bounded agent personas too; (3) PassportClaimModal + Claim/In-Wallet pills in PassportRegistryTab; (4) PassportQube section in SmartWalletDrawer iQube tab; (5) registry class filters now render in the tier-3 sub-menu row (removed blocking single-entry subTabs); (6) metaMe Cartridge agentiqos group gained the missing Polity Passport mirror tab at order 45.5 — Steward stays admin-gated through the mirror. Operator: run migration + set PASSPORT_BUREAU_CREDENTIAL_SECRET in Amplify.
